TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Maibul a niyadu == u maibul a niyadu itida i teban nu kalingku atu taytu a buyubuyuan, isasa nu hecek nu sapat u kaliking sapat a niyadu' lukulin anikuwana. i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Maibul. ŚúįŚźćŤĶ∑śļź "taywan binacanan a cudad nu pacangcah a tungus" i cudac sikamu nama kayca ku ngangan nu maibul sa, namahini i kasumamadan idaw kya hulam, pacakay tu tuudtu-ud u binawlan tayni i tini malaliyun tu tuud, kyu pangangan hantu tu maibul, u imi sa, u malaliyun tu tuud sa. Muenengay itini yabamalaki ci tubah kumud aci litongyi hini sa, maibul u malasutay ku balad sananay, naayaw maibul a niyadu, yadah ku sakul a kilang, isauwac yadah ku baetu, itini tanu iki sa, sisa katuud ku badakuwang malupu, u tebus maibuk satu, panganga hantu tu maibul. ŚúįŚźćŚĄ™ŚčĘ Maibul u satimulan a niyadu' nu sakidaya, sakidaya a niyadu' maupu i kalingku, i taytu idaw ku nu milaliway a sakidaya cayka hacica ku tamdaw, cayka hida tu i kalingkuway masa niyaniyadu. Maibul a niyadu cay kalcad, nika maniket malacawa tu i masasubiyaway a niyadu kalala sapat a pangcah manikek, nika malcad ku balucu nu maibulay a niyadu, saka tahkal a dadan caykakapah malawa, itidaay a kiwkay malaluk pasubana tu kamu nu sakidaya sisa u maibul aniyadu' sikamu henay tu nu sakidaya a kamu.
S.PHON: == maibur~…ĺ a nijadu == u maibur~…ĺ a nijadu itida i t…ôban nu kar~…ĺiŇčku atu tajtu a bujubujuan, isasa nu ńß…ô ¶…ôk nu sapat u kar~…ĺikiŇč sapat a nijadu Ē~ ° r~…ĺukur~…ĺin anikuwana. i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu maibur~…ĺ. **** "tajwan bina ¶anan a ¶udad nu pa ¶aŇč ¶ańß a tuŇčus" i ¶uda ¶ sikamu nama kaj ¶a ku ŇčaŇčan nu maibur~…ĺ sa, namańßini i kasumamadan idaw kja ńßur~…ĺam, pa ¶akaj tu tuudtu-ud u binawr~…ĺan tajni i tini mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu tuud, kju paŇčaŇčan ńßantu tu maibur~…ĺ, u imi sa, u mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu tuud sa. mu…ôn…ôŇčaj itini jabamar~…ĺaki ¶i tubańß kumud a ¶i r~…ĺitoŇčji ńßini sa, maibur~…ĺ u mar~…ĺasutaj ku bar~…ĺad sananaj, naajaw maibur~…ĺ a nijadu, jadańß ku sakur~…ĺ a kir~…ĺaŇč, isauwa ¶ jadańß ku ba…ôtu, itini tanu iki sa, sisa katuud ku badakuwaŇč mar~…ĺupu, u t…ôbus maibuk satu, paŇčaŇča ńßantu tu maibur~…ĺ. **** maibur~…ĺ u satimur~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ ° nu sakidaja, sakidaja a nijadu Ē~ ° maupu i kar~…ĺiŇčku, i tajtu idaw ku nu mir~…ĺar~…ĺiwaj a sakidaja ¶ajka ńßa ¶i ¶a ku tamdaw, ¶ajka ńßida tu i kar~…ĺiŇčkuwaj masa nijanijadu. maibur~…ĺ a nijadu ¶aj kar~…ĺ ¶ad, nika manik…ôt mar~…ĺa ¶awa tu i masasubijawaj a nijadu kar~…ĺar~…ĺa sapat a paŇč ¶ańß manik…ôk, nika mar~…ĺ ¶ad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u nu maibur~…ĺaj a nijadu, saka tańßkar~…ĺ a dadan ¶ajkakapańß mar~…ĺawa, itidaaj a kiwkaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺuk pasubana tu kamu nu sakidaja sisa u maibur~…ĺ anijadu Ē~ ° sikamu ńß…ônaj tu nu sakidaja a kamu.
S.FORM: == Maibul a niyadu == u maibul a niyadu itida i teban nu kalingku atu taytu a buyubuyuan, isasa nu hecek nu sapat u kaliking sapat a niyadu' lukulin anikuwana. i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Maibul. ŚúįŚźćŤĶ∑śļź "taywan binacanan a cudad nu pacangcah a tungus" i cudac sikamu nama kayca ku ngangan nu maibul sa, namahini i kasumamadan idaw kya hulam, pacakay tu tuudtu-ud u binawlan tayni i tini malaliyun tu tuud, kyu pangangan hantu tu maibul, u imi sa, u malaliyun tu tuud sa. Muenengay itini yabamalaki ci tubah kumud aci litongyi hini sa, maibul u malasutay ku balad sananay, naayaw maibul a niyadu, yadah ku sakul a kilang, isauwac yadah ku baetu, itini tanu iki sa, sisa katuud ku badakuwang malupu, u tebus maibuk satu, panganga hantu tu maibul. ŚúįŚźćŚĄ™ŚčĘ Maibul u satimulan a niyadu' nu sakidaya, sakidaya a niyadu' maupu i kalingku, i taytu idaw ku nu milaliway a sakidaya cayka hacica ku tamdaw, cayka hida tu i kalingkuway masa niyaniyadu. Maibul a niyadu cay kalcad, nika maniket malacawa tu i masasubiyaway a niyadu kalala sapat a pangcah manikek, nika malcad ku balucu nu maibulay a niyadu, saka tahkal a dadan caykakapah malawa, itidaay a kiwkay malaluk pasubana tu kamu nu sakidaya sisa u maibul aniyadu' sikamu henay tu nu sakidaya a kamu.
S.PHON: == maibur~…ĺ a nijadu == u maibur~…ĺ a nijadu itida i t…ôban nu kar~…ĺiŇčku atu tajtu a bujubujuan, isasa nu ńß…ô ¶…ôk nu sapat u kar~…ĺikiŇč sapat a nijadu Ē~ ° r~…ĺukur~…ĺin anikuwana. i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu maibur~…ĺ. **** "tajwan bina ¶anan a ¶udad nu pa ¶aŇč ¶ańß a tuŇčus" i ¶uda ¶ sikamu nama kaj ¶a ku ŇčaŇčan nu maibur~…ĺ sa, namańßini i kasumamadan idaw kja ńßur~…ĺam, pa ¶akaj tu tuudtu-ud u binawr~…ĺan tajni i tini mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu tuud, kju paŇčaŇčan ńßantu tu maibur~…ĺ, u imi sa, u mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu tuud sa. mu…ôn…ôŇčaj itini jabamar~…ĺaki ¶i tubańß kumud a ¶i r~…ĺitoŇčji ńßini sa, maibur~…ĺ u mar~…ĺasutaj ku bar~…ĺad sananaj, naajaw maibur~…ĺ a nijadu, jadańß ku sakur~…ĺ a kir~…ĺaŇč, isauwa ¶ jadańß ku ba…ôtu, itini tanu iki sa, sisa katuud ku badakuwaŇč mar~…ĺupu, u t…ôbus maibuk satu, paŇčaŇča ńßantu tu maibur~…ĺ. **** maibur~…ĺ u satimur~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ ° nu sakidaja, sakidaja a nijadu Ē~ ° maupu i kar~…ĺiŇčku, i tajtu idaw ku nu mir~…ĺar~…ĺiwaj a sakidaja ¶ajka ńßa ¶i ¶a ku tamdaw, ¶ajka ńßida tu i kar~…ĺiŇčkuwaj masa nijanijadu. maibur~…ĺ a nijadu ¶aj kar~…ĺ ¶ad, nika manik…ôt mar~…ĺa ¶awa tu i masasubijawaj a nijadu kar~…ĺar~…ĺa sapat a paŇč ¶ańß manik…ôk, nika mar~…ĺ ¶ad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u nu maibur~…ĺaj a nijadu, saka tańßkar~…ĺ a dadan ¶ajkakapańß mar~…ĺawa, itidaaj a kiwkaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺuk pasubana tu kamu nu sakidaja sisa u maibur~…ĺ anijadu Ē~ ° sikamu ńß…ônaj tu nu sakidaja a kamu.
